articles.title: Dragons Hold Top Four in Late Rally
articles.subtext: Tamil Nadu close a two-goal deficit and take crucial points in Chennai.
articles.article_md:
# Dragons Hold Top Four

Accord Tamil Nadu Dragons produced a late comeback in front of a packed home crowd.

## Match Turning Point

- Pressure increased after halftime
- Midfield press forced turnovers
- Final quarter delivered two clean finishes

### Coach Notes

The staff credited discipline and bench impact for the turnaround.

articles.title: Super Warriors Extend Win Streak
articles.subtext: Pickleball leaders continue dominant form ahead of quarter finals.
articles.article_md:
# Super Warriors Extend Win Streak

The Chennai side registered another controlled victory to remain title favorites.

## What Worked

- Fast starts in every set
- Smart rotation under pressure
- Clinical finishing at key points

### Next Up

The team now prepares for a high-intensity quarter final weekend.

articles.title: Kasi Warriors Lock Semifinal Spot
articles.subtext: Volleyball unit secures top seeding with one fixture to spare.
articles.article_md:
# Kasi Warriors Lock Semifinal Spot

Kasi Warriors sealed qualification with balanced offense and strong serving phases.

## Performance Snapshot

- Service pressure created 12 direct points
- Back-row defense held opponents below target
- Closing sets were managed with composure

articles.title: Accord Warriors Final Over Masterclass
articles.subtext: Cricket squad closes a tense chase with two balls remaining.
articles.article_md: # Accord Warriors Final Over Masterclass\n\nA composed final-over partnership took the match away from the opposition in style.
